rationale: The cited paper is highly topically aligned with the citing paper’s core question (within-firm online/offline spillovers in omnichannel retail) and offers quasi-experimental evidence on substitution/complementarity and brand-presence mechanisms that the citing note also foregrounds. Given this strong conceptual and methodological overlap—even though we only have DOI-level match evidence—it is not safely an incidental mention and should be retained for full relation judgment.
